name: 商業酒會/社交場
description: 上流社會社交場景同時推進商業線和感情線，Ashley展現專業知識贏得認可，也面對Cora和Josh的突然出現帶來的身份危機。

examples.drama_title: love drama "I was tricked into marrying a blind CEO I didn't know" HD FULL, CEO,ENGSUB,  Episodes
examples.excerpt: I admire the LC group's dedication to sourcing new natural ingredients from unexplored regions and varieties. As expected by the green family, truly knowledgeable in perfumery. Kindred spirits.
examples.context: 上流社會社交場景同時推進商業線和感情線，Ashley展現專業知識贏得認可，也面對Cora和Josh的突然出現帶來的身份危機。
